subcodes.first_line: O thou traveler from God unto God! Thy successive letters have been received, and from their contents spiritual traces are manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مسافر من الله الی الله چند مراسله آنجناب متواصل و از مضامینش آثار روحانیت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
